query:
-- Check if TIAB SIMs can be matched via MSISDN to the services table
SELECT ts.tiabServiceId, ts.tiabCustomerId, ts.msisdn, ts.planName,
       s.externalId as serviceExternalId, s.phoneNumber, s.serviceType
FROM tiab_services ts
LEFT JOIN services s ON (s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn OR s.serviceId = ts.msisdn)
WHERE ts.msisdn IS NOT NULL AND ts.msisdn != ''
ORDER BY ts.tiabCustomerId
LIMIT 10;
command:

-- Check if TIAB SIMs can be matched via MSISDN to the services table
SELECT ts.tiabServiceId, ts.tiabCustomerId, ts.msisdn, ts.planName,
       s.externalId as serviceExternalId, s.phoneNumber, s.serviceType
FROM tiab_services ts
LEFT JOIN services s ON (s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn OR s.serviceId = ts.msisdn)
WHERE ts.msisdn IS NOT NULL AND ts.msisdn != ''
ORDER BY ts.tiabCustomerId
LIMIT 10;
